The question is asking to determine which specific years had total losses below 350,000. To find out, we need to examine each year's value in the dataset and filter for those with values below 350,000. We can also use the f_sort_column() operation to sort the total losses in ascending order to easily identify years with losses below the threshold.

The question is asking to identify which specific years had total losses below 350,000. Since each row represents data for different years and the "total" column shows the cumulative loss for each row, we need to examine the "total" values to find those below 350,000. We can use f_filter_rows(total < 350000) to isolate the years where this condition is met.

The only years where total losses were below 350,000 are 1944/45 (270,000).
